content.problemStatement:
As a health expert, Vinay is keeping a close watch on the ongoing pandemic of coronavirus disease (COVID-19). He thought of a different situation where there are 262626 types of viruses, named "**a**orona", "**b**orona", "**c**orona", ..., "**z**orona".

You are given a string SSS with length NNN. There are NNN people (numbered 111 through NNN) and for each valid iii, the iii-th person is infected by exactly one type of virus named SiS_iSi​orona (i.e. "corona" with the first letter replaced by the iii-th character of SSS).

You should answer QQQ queries. In each query:


You are given an integer CCC denoting the number of available isolation centers.
Each isolation center has an infinite capacity, but with the restriction that two people infected with the same type of virus cannot stay in the same isolation center.
There is also a pending queue with an infinite capacity and there are no restrictions on which people can be in the pending queue.
Initially, the isolation centers and pending queue are empty.
Each of the NNN people should be placed in either the pending queue or one of the isolation centers.
Since Vinay is busy finding a vaccine, he asks Swapnil to find a way to place the people in the pending queue and isolation centers such that the number of people in the pending queue is the smallest possible.
Help Swapnil find the size of the pending queue in that case.
constraints: SSS contains only lowercase English letters
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10510^5105
the sum of QQQ over all test cases does not exceed 10510^5105
Subtasks**Subtask #1 (20 points):** T,N,Q,C≤10T, N, Q, C \le 10T,N,Q,C≤10
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and QQQ.
The second line contains a single string SSS.
Each of the following QQQ lines contains a single integer CCC describing a query.
content.outputFormat: For each query, print a single line containing one integer ― the minimum size of the pending queue.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: In the pending queue for the first query, there should be 222 people with "eorona", 222 with "sorona", 111 with "aorona" and 111 with "iorona".
